hero.title: Hey, I'm Oumy IT Business Analyst
description: Passionate about designing application solutions, I focus on understanding business needs to deliver concrete and user-oriented solutions.</br></br>I have had the opportunity to work across all stages of a project lifecycle, from requirements gathering to functional validation. I collaborate closely with stakeholders while placing strong emphasis on data quality and solution reliability.

textBlocks: Quality is never an accident; it is always the result of intelligent effort.
quote.text: Quality is never an accident; it is always the result of intelligent effort.
quote.author: John Ruskin

about.title: about
description: Throughout my journey, I have developed an approach focused on understanding user needs and processes.
I have worked on projects combining data, ERP systems, and reporting tools, which allowed me to structure data, design dashboards, and optimize processes.
Curious and detail-oriented, I continuously monitor new technologies to identify innovative solutions and address operational challenges.

contacts.title: contact
contacts.text: I aim to apply my skills in functional analysis, data, and information systems to an IT Business Analyst role.

description: Throughout my professional journey, I have built a profile at the intersection of application development and data management.
I started with a SysOps DevOps training, which gave me a strong understanding of infrastructure, deployment, and system operations challenges.
I then transitioned into application development, earning my degree as an Application Developer.
In 2023, I joined TSF as an IT Business Analyst apprentice, where I contributed to various projects in collaboration with business teams.

Recently graduated in Artificial Intelligence project management, my ambition is to work in an innovative environment, designing practical solutions at the intersection of business needs and information systems.

facts.title: fun facts
list: When I discover the business logic is in the database… I understand everything—except why.
My code compiles better after coffee. Coincidence? I don’t think so.
I’m convinced bugs appear more often when someone is watching my screen.

experience_pro.title: professional experience
experience_pro.poste: Apprentice – IT Business Analyst & AI – TSF Group
list: Design and maintenance of Power BI dashboards (data modeling, DAX, business KPIs, and data reliability)
Implementation of data quality controls and consistency rules for operational monitoring
AI project: assistant for automating contracts and ERP workflows through XML file generation
Technology watch and benchmarking of AI agents to identify the most suitable solution
Business needs analysis and ERP process optimization
Creation and optimization of complex SQL queries and views
Participation in ERP functional administration (permissions, workflows, and automation)
list2: Application architecture design and data structuring
Implementation of a PostgreSQL relational database
Development of interfaces connected to APIs with data tracking and validation
Design and execution of functional test plans to ensure delivery quality
